week.description: ISO week the task was created in.

completedBy.description: Person key of the user who marked the task done (typically @me).

author.description: Person key of the task author (set at create time, immutable).

responsible.description: Person key of the person responsible for the task. Defaults to author at creation.

dueDate.description: Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) or date+time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) when the task is due.

note.description: Inline note attached to the task.

commentFile.description: Path to a sidecar markdown comment file (week/file).
